creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 208171
burp-devel - 2.3.16

Changelog:
https://burp.grke.org/changelog.html

Tested successfully with poudriere on {11.3,12.0}-RELEASE {i386,amd64}.

I also added a comment both to sysutils/burp (master port) and to sysutils/burp-devel (slave port) to remind myself and whoever needs to bump PORTREVISION that PORTREVISION is better tracked separately for these two ports.
